claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A standalone controlled or uncontrolled disclosure without inappropriate accordion semantics.
semantics: The trigger is a native button whose aria-expanded and aria-controls relationship is owned by React Aria.
The content is one disclosure panel and the component does not synthesize a heading, tablist, accordion, or unrelated composite role.
Controlled and uncontrolled state share the same activation path; disabled prevents activation.

preferences.forcedColors: System focus and native disabled state remain visible without relying on color.
preferences.reducedMotion: Indicator rotation is removed while aria-expanded and visibility remain authoritative.
preferences.rtl: Logical layout mirrors without changing native disclosure keys.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Trigger text and content wrap and reflow without clipping focus.
